package rulecoverage

func PositiveDefaultValueInjectionScatteredAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "default_value_injection_scattered_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated defaulting logic for pagination, filters, or booleans across handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
